rationale: All four words are present with correct text, casing, weight, and the yellow (#FFC400) oversized NOTHING punchline, and the staggered punch-in reads across the filmstrip (SHIP/FAST first, then the full block). However the timing deviates: the first ~two tiles are empty before any word appears, the hold occupies far more than the briefed ~1.5s, no pulse on NOTHING is discernible across the hold tiles, and the horizontal fly-out exit is never visible — the block is fully intact in the last filmstrip tile yet the 100% still is blank, reading as a cut rather than an accelerating exit. Composition is clean and optically centered with consistent line spacing and nothing clipped, and the typography is simple but confident; the missing exit choreography and dead intro keep it from shipping as-is.
